versions.version_description: This version is for any starters in guitar. Capo is needed. Thanks and Enjoy. Link for Song- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rRJ0lpu6XaU. My Best Friend: Tim McGraw.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: You Look So Good In Love

recommended.version_description: No Capo, Half Step Down, sounds fine in standard as well.

content:
[ch]A[/ch]    : 5-7-7-6-5-5
[ch]E/G#[/ch] : 4-7-6-4-5-4
[ch]G[/ch]    : 3-5-5-4-3-3
[ch]D/F#[/ch] : 2-x-0-2-3-2
[ch]D[/ch]    : x-x-0-2-3-2
[ch]E[/ch]    : 0-2-2-1-0-0
[ch]Dbm7[/ch]:  x-4-6-4-5-4

[INTRO]
[ch]A[/ch], [ch]E/G#[/ch], [ch]G[/ch], [ch]D/F#[/ch], [ch]D[/ch], [ch]A[/ch], [ch]E[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E/G#[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]
I never had no one, I could count on[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch] 
I been let down so many times[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E/G#[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]
I was tired of hurtin', So tired of searchin'[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
Till' you walked into my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
It was a feelin', I've never known[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
For the first time, I didn't feel alone[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch] - [ch]E/G#[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
Your more than a lover, there could never be another[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch] 
To make me feel the way you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]-[ch]E/G#[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]      
Oh, we just get closer, I fall in love all over[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch] 
Everytime I look at you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/G#[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]                         
I don't know where I'd be, without you hear with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Dbm7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]                
Life with you makes perfect sense, Your my best friend[/tab]
 (Intro Chords)
Your my best friend, Oh yeah

[Verse 2]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]E/G#[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
You stand by me, And you believe in me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
Like nobody every has[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]E/G#[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]  
When my world goes crazy, Your right there to save me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch] 
You make me see how much I have[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch] 
I still tremble when we touch[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, the look in your eyes, When we make love[/tab]
